productDisplayName: Clarks Men Unstructured Leather Black Sandals
description: This two-bar Unstructured leather sandal from clarks has a sporty and trail-inspired look. Lightweight, flexible and heavily breathable, it& rsquo s a perfect addition to your wardrobe of casual footwear.UpperTwo leather straps with Velcro adjustment closures for absolute customizable comfort and to offer easy wear and removalPerforated lining and cushioned footbed with mesh panels on the sides of straps for absolute ventilationHaul loop to hang onto a backpack when trekkingOutsoleDurable and flexible rubber outsole with curved mid arch periphery for ergonomic comfortTextured and grooved lugs strategically placed in high-wear areas for durabilityGrooves along the outsole for easy air movement offering perfect tractionCareClean the leather with a leather brushDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
